crime.value: Murder of young blonde woman in alley, appearing as robbery gone wrong
crime.quote: A small handbag lays discarded next to her, its contents scattered, a clear sign of a robbery gone dreadfully wrong.

victim.value: Young, beautiful blonde woman found dead in alley
victim.quote: Long wavy locks of golden blonde hair frames a heart shaped face, culminated by full pink lips.

closed_world.value: Haven - a dystopian city with class separation between slums and upper areas
closed_world.quote: When Haven made sense, before the separation of the so called classes. The poor bastards barely surviving in the slums

investigator.value: Kyler James Grimshaw - experienced detective with world-weary demeanor
investigator.quote: Eyes that reflect a lifetime of experiences, good and bad. Mostly bad.

red_herring.value: Robbery gone wrong - handbag scattered contents suggest false motive while true killer remains hidden
red_herring.quote: A small handbag lays discarded next to her, its contents scattered, a clear sign of a robbery gone dreadfully wrong.

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence presented to reader - scattered handbag, victim's serene expression, crime scene details
clue_fairness.quote: She lays wide eyed and starring, fixed in her last moments, although her expression seems serene.

social_world.value: Class-divided Haven - technological tyranny of wealthy over slum dwellers, border controls, survival hierarchy
social_world.quote: The poor bastards barely surviving in the slums, living under the technological tyranny of better men.

media_and_audience.value: Press scavengers arrive immediately, cameras flashing, treating beautiful victim as spectacle
media_and_audience.quote: The first of the night's scavengers have arrived to feast at the carrion, pushing and shoving, cameras flashing

investigator_wound.value: Grimshaw's physical illness, isolation, death wish, and haunting memories of past cases
investigator_wound.quote: No more bitter lonely nights, with nothing but a bottle of scotch to cure the insomnia, to make the ghosts
